meaning: 铜带(省)[赞比亚省名](因蕴藏有丰富的铜矿而得名,为世界闻名的铜带的一部分) ;n.铜带(指非洲蕴藏有铜矿的地区以及在此基础上发展起来的工矿业地带)
examples: Chambishi mine is one of typical copper deposits in Zambia-DRC copperbelt, and its orebody lies in lower Roan Group.
The tenitorial combination of the copper-cobalt industries and the regularity of the inter-relations of the metallurgical industrial allocation in the Copperbelt are discussed.
He is popular in the capital, Lusaka, and in the Copperbelt, the economy's power-house.
The fans were crushed to death as they left Konkola Stadium in the Copperbelt town of Chililabombwe.
Half of the copperbelt is in Zambia, which is now privatising its mines.
